title: MA2H GET Message Body (v0.4)
description: Body of GET /v1/messages/{id}: the original message plus current `status`, the Hub-assigned `id`, and (once terminal) the embedded `response`.

response.description: Present once the message is terminal (ask/task). Embeds the full Response envelope.

delivery.description: Additive receipt track (v0.4, spec §14.2), orthogonal to `status`/`response`. Present on a Hub offering the ack primitive; the human reads it to see whether the agent got and acknowledged the answer. GET /v1/messages/{id} is the agent->human (ask/task) leg, so only the response-leg states appear here (the directive-only `queued`/`delivered` belong to the mailbox, §13).

delivered_at.description: When the receiving party got the message (directive drained, or Response push-2xx / agent GET).

ack.description: The ack envelope, present once state is `acknowledged`.
